Package org.apache.juneau.commons.bean

Class BeanConfigContext.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.BeanConfigContext.Builder
Enclosing class:
BeanConfigContext
public static final class BeanConfigContext.Builder extends Object
Builder for BeanConfigContext.

    Description
    BeanConfigContext.Builder

    Sets the active AnnotationProvider.

    Sets the minimum bean class visibility.

    Sets the minimum bean constructor visibility.

    beanFieldVisibility(Visibility value)
    Sets the minimum bean field visibility.

    Toggles whether BeanMap.put(String,Object) returns the previous value rather than null.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder

    Sets the BeanMetaInitializer SPI hook for marshalling-side BeanMeta construction.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    beanMethodVisibility(Visibility value)
    Sets the minimum bean method visibility.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    beanPropertyPostProcessor(BeanPropertyPostProcessor value)
    Sets the BeanPropertyPostProcessor SPI hook for marshalling-side bean-property post-processing.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    beansRequireDefaultConstructor(boolean value)
    Toggles the requirement that beans have a no-arg default constructor.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    beansRequireSerializable(boolean value)
    Toggles the requirement that beans implement Serializable.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    beansRequireSettersForGetters(boolean value)
    Toggles the requirement that bean getters have matching setters.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    beansRequireSomeProperties(boolean value)
    Toggles the requirement that beans expose at least one property.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    beanStore(BeanStore value)
    Sets the active BeanStore used for factory-based bean instantiation.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    beanTypePropertyName(String value)
    Sets the property name used to embed the bean dictionary type (default: "_type").
    BeanConfigContext
    build()
    Builds a new BeanConfigContext from this builder's state.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    findFluentSetters(boolean value)
    Toggles fluent-setter detection (setters that return this).
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters(boolean value)
    Toggles silent suppression of exceptions thrown by bean property getters.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters(boolean value)
    Toggles silent suppression of exceptions thrown by bean property setters.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    ignoreMissingSetters(boolean value)
    Toggles silent ignoring of properties without setters during deserialization.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    ignoreTransientFields(boolean value)
    Toggles exclusion of transient fields from bean property detection.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    ignoreUnknownBeanProperties(boolean value)
    Toggles silent ignoring of unknown properties on incoming bean payloads.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    ignoreUnknownNullBeanProperties(boolean value)
    Toggles silent ignoring of attempts to set unknown bean properties to null.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    notABeanPredicate(Predicate<ClassInfo> value)
    Installs a custom predicate that fully overrides BeanConfigContext.isNotABean(ClassInfo).
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    notBeanClasses(Class<?>... values)
    Adds classes (and supertypes) that should be excluded from bean detection.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    notBeanClasses(Collection<? extends Class<?>> values)
    Replaces the not-a-bean class set.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    notBeanPackageNames(String... values)
    Adds package names whose classes should be excluded from bean detection.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    notBeanPackageNames(Collection<String> values)
    Replaces the not-a-bean package name set.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    notBeanPackagePrefixes(String... values)
    Adds package prefixes whose classes should be excluded from bean detection.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    notBeanPackagePrefixes(Collection<String> values)
    Replaces the not-a-bean package prefix set.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    propertyNamer(PropertyNamer value)
    Sets the PropertyNamer used to derive property names.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    unsortedProperties(boolean value)
    Toggles whether properties remain in JVM-discovered (non-alphabetical) order.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    useInterfaceProxies(boolean value)
    Toggles automatic creation of interface proxies for bean interfaces.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder

    Toggles use of Introspector for property discovery.

  • Method Details

    • build

      public BeanConfigContext build()
      Builds a new BeanConfigContext from this builder's state.
      Returns:
      A new immutable BeanConfigContext.

    • beanClassVisibility

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder beanClassVisibility(Visibility value)
      Sets the minimum bean class visibility.
      Parameters:
      value - The visibility threshold. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • beanConstructorVisibility

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder beanConstructorVisibility(Visibility value)
      Sets the minimum bean constructor visibility.
      Parameters:
      value - The visibility threshold. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • beanFieldVisibility

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder beanFieldVisibility(Visibility value)
      Sets the minimum bean field visibility.
      Parameters:
      value - The visibility threshold. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • beanMethodVisibility

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder beanMethodVisibility(Visibility value)
      Sets the minimum bean method visibility.
      Parameters:
      value - The visibility threshold. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • beanMapPutReturnsOldValue

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder beanMapPutReturnsOldValue(boolean value)
      Toggles whether BeanMap.put(String,Object) returns the previous value rather than null.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • beansRequireDefaultConstructor

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder beansRequireDefaultConstructor(boolean value)
      Toggles the requirement that beans have a no-arg default constructor.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • beansRequireSerializable

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder beansRequireSerializable(boolean value)
      Toggles the requirement that beans implement Serializable.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • beansRequireSettersForGetters

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder beansRequireSettersForGetters(boolean value)
      Toggles the requirement that bean getters have matching setters.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • beansRequireSomeProperties

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder beansRequireSomeProperties(boolean value)
      Toggles the requirement that beans expose at least one property.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • findFluentSetters

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder findFluentSetters(boolean value)
      Toggles fluent-setter detection (setters that return this).
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters(boolean value)
      Toggles silent suppression of exceptions thrown by bean property getters.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters(boolean value)
      Toggles silent suppression of exceptions thrown by bean property setters.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • ignoreMissingSetters

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder ignoreMissingSetters(boolean value)
      Toggles silent ignoring of properties without setters during deserialization.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • ignoreTransientFields

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder ignoreTransientFields(boolean value)
      Toggles exclusion of transient fields from bean property detection.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • ignoreUnknownBeanProperties

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder ignoreUnknownBeanProperties(boolean value)
      Toggles silent ignoring of unknown properties on incoming bean payloads.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • ignoreUnknownNullBeanProperties

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder ignoreUnknownNullBeanProperties(boolean value)
      Toggles silent ignoring of attempts to set unknown bean properties to null.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • unsortedProperties

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder unsortedProperties(boolean value)
      Toggles whether properties remain in JVM-discovered (non-alphabetical) order.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • useInterfaceProxies

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder useInterfaceProxies(boolean value)
      Toggles automatic creation of interface proxies for bean interfaces.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • useJavaBeanIntrospector

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder useJavaBeanIntrospector(boolean value)
      Toggles use of Introspector for property discovery.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • propertyNamer

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder propertyNamer(PropertyNamer value)
      Sets the PropertyNamer used to derive property names.
      Parameters:
      value - The property namer. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • beanTypePropertyName

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder beanTypePropertyName(String value)
      Sets the property name used to embed the bean dictionary type (default: "_type").
      Parameters:
      value - The property name. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • notBeanPackageNames

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder notBeanPackageNames(String... values)
      Adds package names whose classes should be excluded from bean detection.
      Parameters:
      values - The package names. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • notBeanPackagePrefixes

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder notBeanPackagePrefixes(String... values)
      Adds package prefixes whose classes should be excluded from bean detection.
      Parameters:
      values - The package prefixes. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • notBeanClasses

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder notBeanClasses(Class<?>... values)
      Adds classes (and supertypes) that should be excluded from bean detection.
      Parameters:
      values - The classes. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • notBeanPackageNames

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder notBeanPackageNames(Collection<String> values)
      Replaces the not-a-bean package name set.
      Parameters:
      values - The package names. May be null for an empty set.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • notBeanPackagePrefixes

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder notBeanPackagePrefixes(Collection<String> values)
      Replaces the not-a-bean package prefix set.
      Parameters:
      values - The package prefixes. May be null for an empty set.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • notBeanClasses

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder notBeanClasses(Collection<? extends Class<?>> values)
      Replaces the not-a-bean class set.
      Parameters:
      values - The classes. May be null for an empty set.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • beanStore

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder beanStore(BeanStore value)
      Sets the active BeanStore used for factory-based bean instantiation.
      Parameters:
      value - The bean store. May be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • annotationProvider

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder annotationProvider(AnnotationProvider value)
      Sets the active AnnotationProvider.
      Parameters:
      value - The annotation provider. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • notABeanPredicate

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder notABeanPredicate(Predicate<ClassInfo> value)
      Installs a custom predicate that fully overrides BeanConfigContext.isNotABean(ClassInfo).

      When set, the default not-bean computation (package/class exclusions, array/primitive/enum/annotation checks) is bypassed entirely. Pass null to revert to the built-in behavior.

      Parameters:
      value - The predicate. May be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • beanMetaInitializer

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder beanMetaInitializer(BeanMetaInitializer value)
      Sets the BeanMetaInitializer SPI hook for marshalling-side BeanMeta construction.

      Pass null to reset to BeanMetaInitializer.NOOP (commons-side default).

      Parameters:
      value - The initializer. May be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • beanPropertyPostProcessor

      public BeanConfigContext.Builder beanPropertyPostProcessor(BeanPropertyPostProcessor value)
      Sets the BeanPropertyPostProcessor SPI hook for marshalling-side bean-property post-processing.

      Pass null to reset to BeanPropertyPostProcessor.NOOP (commons-side default).

      Parameters:
      value - The post-processor. May be null.
      Returns:
      This object.
